tasks.label: Restart Finance Sim
tasks.command: pkill -f 'node server.js' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'node seed.js' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && npm start

tasks.label: ⬇️ Pull Latest Code & Restart
tasks.command: git fetch origin && git checkout copilot/find-alternatives-to-replit && git pull origin copilot/find-alternatives-to-replit && npm install && pkill -f 'node server.js' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'node seed.js' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && npm start
